name: autoskill-md
purpose: This native CLI writes a skills file for agents.
auth: No auth is needed to read this repo or run the CLI.
safeActions: Scan local code comments and route hints.
Run through Rust, npm, Python, or Go wrappers.
riskyActions: Ask before publishing files or changing a remote repo.
Use --strict only when CI should fail.
limits: Use a slow pace on large repos.
